(*ast.Program)({
	EOFToken: (token.Token) {
		Position: (token.Position) {
			Line: (int) 1,
			Column: (int) 10
		},
		Type: (token.Type) 0,
		Literal: (string) "",
		LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
		AfterNewline: (bool) false
	},
	Stmts: ([]ast.Node) (len=2) {
		(*ast.LetStmt)({
			LetToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 0
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 29,
				Literal: (string) (len=3) "let",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			AssignToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 6
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 7,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "=",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			SemiToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 0
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 21,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) ";",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Name: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 0,
					Column: (int) 4
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 1,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "x",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Value: (*ast.BasicLit)({
				Value: (token.Token) {
					Position: (token.Position) {
						Line: (int) 0,
						Column: (int) 8
					},
					Type: (token.Type) 5,
					Literal: (string) (len=3) "100",
					LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
					AfterNewline: (bool) false
				}
			})
		}),
		(*ast.LetStmt)({
			LetToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 0
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 29,
				Literal: (string) (len=3) "let",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) (len=1) {
					(token.Token) {
						Position: (token.Position) {
							Line: (int) 1,
							Column: (int) 0
						},
						Type: (token.Type) 26,
						Literal: (string) (len=1) "\n",
						LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
						AfterNewline: (bool) false
					}
				},
				AfterNewline: (bool) true
			},
			AssignToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 6
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 7,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "=",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			SemiToken: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 10
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 21,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) ";",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Name: (token.Token) {
				Position: (token.Position) {
					Line: (int) 1,
					Column: (int) 4
				},
				Type: (token.Type) 1,
				Literal: (string) (len=1) "y",
				LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
				AfterNewline: (bool) false
			},
			Value: (*ast.BasicLit)({
				Value: (token.Token) {
					Position: (token.Position) {
						Line: (int) 1,
						Column: (int) 8
					},
					Type: (token.Type) 5,
					Literal: (string) (len=3) "200",
					LeadingTrivia: ([]token.Token) <nil>,
					AfterNewline: (bool) false
				}
			})
		})
	}
})
